display.purpose: Public-facing hero and executive overview only.

headline.purpose: Page titles and major report headings.

body.purpose: Explanations, values, forms, and standard content.

shadows.name: surface-hover
shadows.purpose: Hover state for clickable tiles only.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action for an operational workflow.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-height: 40px; padding: 10px 18px; border: 0; border-radius: 10px; background: #007ACC; color: #FFFFFF; font: 600 13px/1.4 Montserrat, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: .02em; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #006BA8; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3D7EFF; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { min-height: 40px; padding: 10px 18px; border: 1px solid #D8DDE8; border-radius: 10px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #00246B; font: 600 13px/1.4 Montserrat, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: .02em; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #F5F5F5; border-color: #A9B4CA; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3D7EFF; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Field
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 8px; color: #00246B; font: 600 13px/1.4 Montserrat, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-field input { min-height: 40px; padding: 10px 12px; border: 1px solid #D8DDE8; border-radius: 10px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #00246B; font: 400 14px/20px Montserrat, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-field input:hover { border-color: #A9B4CA; } .ds-field input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3D7EFF; outline-offset: 2px; border-color: #007ACC; }

components.name: Selected Filter Chip
components.description: Active dashboard filter or selected state.
components.css: .ds-chip-selected { min-height: 32px; padding: 6px 12px; border: 0; border-radius: 9999px; background: #E2EBFD; color: #00246B; font: 600 13px/1.4 Montserrat, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-chip-selected:hover { background: #D4E2FC; } .ds-chip-selected:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3D7EFF; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Operational Card
components.description: A single grouped region; not a wrapper for more cards.
components.css: .ds-card { padding: 24px; border: 1px solid #E0E0E0; border-radius: 16px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #00246B; font-family: Montserrat, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card h3 { margin: 0 0 16px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px; font-weight: 600; } .ds-card strong { display: block; font-size: 30px; line-height: 1.15; font-weight: 700; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-card p { margin: 8px 0 0; color: #4D608A; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18px; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.css: .ds-status-success { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 5px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #E6F5ED; color: #006637; font: 600 13px/1.4 Montserrat, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-status-success svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; fill: currentColor; }

narrative.overview: EMUSA Operations combines EMUSA's corporate authority with Vescrow's quiet, soft-futuristic product grammar. Brand color structures the interface and communicates state without competing with operational data.

rules.name: Brand Authority
rules.body: EMUSA navy and cyan own structure; Vescrow expansion colors are limited to charts.

rules.name: Operational Scale
rules.body: Product screens use fixed type sizes and stable density.

rules.name: Flat by Default
rules.body: Static panels use either border or shadow, never both as decoration.

dos: Use color for action, state, and data meaning.
Support all component states and three site languages.
donts: Do not use gradients or glass effects.
Do not use marketing claims in operational UI.
Do not communicate status through color alone.
